summary: M391 — Manual extra-attack drain + M392 — SVG corner ornaments. M391: extraAction and _speedExtraRemaining no longer splice the actor back while awaiting player input — instead they drain synchronously inside _dispatchManualAction so the player is prompted exactly once per turn. M392: lozenge corners on hero cards, simple corners on companion cards + the turn-order strip; defs injected once via evSymbols.js. Both behind 'New Combat UI (Beta)'.
